consent.title: Smart University Advisor
consent.intro: Hello! Before we begin, we want to be transparent about how we use your data.
consent.phoneNotStored: Your phone number is not stored — it's only used to send replies
consent.localStorageOnly: Your preferences are stored locally on your device only
consent.noDataSelling: We do not sell or share your data with commercial parties
consent.verifyInfo: Information is advisory — always verify with official sources
consent.agreeText: By continuing, you agree to the
consent.rejectMessage: Sorry, you must accept the Privacy Policy and Terms of Service to continue, in compliance with Qatar's Personal Data Protection and Privacy Law (PDPPL).
consent.licensedUnder: Licensed under the laws of the State of Qatar

chat.errorMessage: Sorry, an error occurred. Please try again.

legal.disclaimer: Disclaimer: Information is advisory and not official
